trans-unit.source: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action.
trans-unit.target: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action.

trans-unit.source: Run a command using the dotnetup-managed dotnet installation.
trans-unit.target: Run a command using the dotnetup-managed dotnet installation.

trans-unit.source: Error: dotnet executable not found at '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Error: dotnet executable not found at '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Error: Failed to start the dotnet process.
trans-unit.target: Error: Failed to start the dotnet process.

trans-unit.source: Arguments to forward to dotnet.
trans-unit.target: Arguments to forward to dotnet.

trans-unit.source: Run 'dotnetup install' to install a .NET SDK first.
trans-unit.target: Run 'dotnetup install' to install a .NET SDK first.

trans-unit.source: Output format (text or json).
trans-unit.target: Output format (text or json).

trans-unit.source: Configuration Commands:
trans-unit.target: Configuration Commands:

trans-unit.source: Description:
trans-unit.target: Description:

trans-unit.source: Install Commands:
trans-unit.target: Install Commands:

trans-unit.source: Options:
trans-unit.target: Options:

trans-unit.source: Query Commands:
trans-unit.target: Query Commands:

trans-unit.source: Usage:
trans-unit.target: Usage:

trans-unit.source: Utility Commands:
trans-unit.target: Utility Commands:

trans-unit.source: Display dotnetup information.
trans-unit.target: Display dotnetup information.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup Information:
trans-unit.target: dotnetup Information:

trans-unit.source: Skip listing installed SDKs (faster).
trans-unit.target: Skip listing installed SDKs (faster).

trans-unit.source: Display dotnetup information.
trans-unit.target: Display dotnetup information.

trans-unit.source: List installed .NET SDKs and runtimes managed by dotnetup.
trans-unit.target: List installed .NET SDKs and runtimes managed by dotnetup.

trans-unit.source: Installations (managed by dotnetup):
trans-unit.target: Installations (managed by dotnetup):

trans-unit.source: (none)
trans-unit.target: (none)

trans-unit.source: Skip verifying that each installation is valid.
trans-unit.target: Skip verifying that each installation is valid.

trans-unit.source: Total
trans-unit.target: Total

trans-unit.source: Use 'dotnetup dotnet' to consume installs managed by dotnetup. New installs can be used alongside your existing installs.
trans-unit.target: Use 'dotnetup dotnet' to consume installs managed by dotnetup. New installs can be used alongside your existing installs.

trans-unit.source: The system will be configured to use dotnetup installs over any other installs.
trans-unit.target: The system will be configured to use dotnetup installs over any other installs.

trans-unit.source: Configure the current shell profile to use installs managed by dotnetup. Only applications launched from the shell will leverage dotnetup installs.
trans-unit.target: Configure the current shell profile to use installs managed by dotnetup. Only applications launched from the shell will leverage dotnetup installs.

trans-unit.source: You can run .NET commands with 'dotnetup dotnet <command>' (or 'dotnetup do <command>' for short).
trans-unit.target: You can run .NET commands with 'dotnetup dotnet <command>' (or 'dotnetup do <command>' for short).

trans-unit.source: PATH and DOTNET_ROOT have been updated. You can use 'dotnet' directly in new terminal sessions.
trans-unit.target: PATH and DOTNET_ROOT have been updated. You can use 'dotnet' directly in new terminal sessions.

trans-unit.source: Your shell profile has been updated. Restart your terminal or source your profile to use 'dotnet' directly.
trans-unit.target: Your shell profile has been updated. Restart your terminal or source your profile to use 'dotnet' directly.

trans-unit.source: Isolation Mode
trans-unit.target: Isolation Mode

trans-unit.source: Replacement Mode
trans-unit.target: Replacement Mode

trans-unit.source: Terminal Mode (Suggested)
trans-unit.target: Terminal Mode (Suggested)

trans-unit.source: Replacement Mode is not supported on this operating system. Please choose Isolation Mode or Terminal Mode instead.
trans-unit.target: Replacement Mode is not supported on this operating system. Please choose Isolation Mode or Terminal Mode instead.

trans-unit.source: Recommended for users without admin rights, or for users who want to keep their system managed installs (e.g. {0}) as the default.
trans-unit.target: Recommended for users without admin rights, or for users who want to keep their system managed installs (e.g. {0}) as the default.

trans-unit.source: Recommended for users who want all of their debuggers, applications, and IDEs to use dotnetup installs by default. Admin privileges are required. Enables 'cmd' functionality by default. Other user accounts on this machine will be impacted and applications may break.
trans-unit.target: Recommended for users who want all of their debuggers, applications, and IDEs to use dotnetup installs by default. Admin privileges are required. Enables 'cmd' functionality by default. Other user accounts on this machine will be impacted and applications may break.

trans-unit.source: Modify the current shell profile file to consume dotnetup on PATH environment variables. Recommended for users who want to develop using dotnetup and launch their IDE through the terminal.
trans-unit.target: Modify the current shell profile file to consume dotnetup on PATH environment variables. Recommended for users who want to develop using dotnetup and launch their IDE through the terminal.

trans-unit.source: Only PowerShell will work in this mode. CMD has no profile file.
trans-unit.target: Only PowerShell will work in this mode. CMD has no profile file.

trans-unit.source: .NET installation manager for user level installs.
trans-unit.target: .NET installation manager for user level installs.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup collects usage data to help improve your experience. You can opt out by setting the DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1'. Learn more: https://aka.ms/dotnetup-telemetry
trans-unit.target: dotnetup collects usage data to help improve your experience. You can opt out by setting the DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1'. Learn more: https://aka.ms/dotnetup-telemetry

trans-unit.source: Run the interactive setup walkthrough to install .NET and configure PATH settings.
trans-unit.target: Run the interactive setup walkthrough to install .NET and configure PATH settings.
